subcodes.first_line: O luminous Bahá'ís! The felicitation of auspicious Naw-Rúz hath become the cause of joy and gladness both night and day [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بهائیان نورانیان تهنئت روز نوروز فیروز سبب سرور و شادمانی شب و روز گردید
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @light and darkness, @growth of the Cause, @East and West; communication between East and West, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
